errors.api_error: ❌ The wallpaper API returned an error for `{players}`. Make sure the player name(s) are correct.
errors.api_unreachable: ❌ Could not reach the wallpaper API. Please try again later.

errors.invalid_username: ❌ Invalid player name! Minecraft usernames must be 3–16 characters and only contain letters, numbers, or underscores.

errors.invalid_host: ❌ Invalid server address! Please provide a valid hostname or IP (e.g. `mc.hypixel.net` or `play.server.net:25565`).
errors.fetch_failed: ❌ Failed to reach the server status API. Please try again later.

success.title: Minecraft Stats Auto-Setup Complete!
success.note: Channels will update automatically every 5 minutes. Make sure the bot has permission to rename voice channels!
